reason: Acceptance checks section 3 scenarios, behavior delta, and section 4 architecture writeback.
Acceptance must confirm all steps are done and checks are passed.
Requirement should be upgraded to current if the feature is accepted.
Roadmap item must be written back from in-progress to done during acceptance.
Roadmap main doc sub-feature list must be synchronized during acceptance.
Architecture must record context manifests as feature-local handoff artifacts, not a new facts layer.
Acceptance verifies the shared manifest contract and materializes the behavior delta.
Acceptance startup requires implementation review evidence before independent verification.
